The Ladykillers (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,692,139Details
International Box Office $37,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $77,392,139
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,634,563 (31.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,583 opening theaters/1,589 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,444,122

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 26th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: August 19th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: R for profanity and violence
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Remake
Plot point: Accidental Death, Covering Up an Accidental Death, Found Money, Heist
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Vietnamese
